[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101001001 4
1 110100110 5
2 001011000 3
3 000100000 1
4 000111100 4
5 010110001 4
6 011111100 6
7 001111110 6

01 10 100001001 3
12 21 100100001 3
23 32 110010000 3
34 43 101001000 3
45 54 100000000 1
56 65 110000000 2
67 76 101000001 3
70 07 100001001 3

02 20 110000001 3
13 31 101001000 3
24 42 100000001 2
35 53 110000000 2
46 64 101000001 3
57 75 100000000 1
60 06 110000001 3
71 17 101001001 4 match 0

03 30 110001000 3
14 41 101001001 4 match 0

36 63 111010000 4
47 74 101001001 4 match 0
50 05 110000000 2
61 16 101000001 3
72 27 100000001 2

15 51 100100000 2
26 62 110010001 4
37 73 101001000 3
